scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/product-service && npm install --prefix backend/order-service && npm install --prefix frontend/next-app
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names "product,order,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend/product-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend/order-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/next-app"
scripts.start: npx concurrently --names "product,order,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend/product-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/order-service" "npm run start --prefix frontend/next-app"
